titleStmt.title: SII 28.33: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 33. (A.R. No. 33 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of

Records that the nāṭṭār of Veṁpar-nāḍu executed the order of the king granting [the village] Kaḷaṉi-vāy in the kīḻ-kūṟṟu of Veṇpar-nāḍu as dēvadānam-mudalaḍaṅga-iṟai-ili including the rights to several levies like vāram, kaḍamai etc. to realise enough capital to provide for food offerings, decoration (chāttuppaḍi) and festival in the month of Puraṭṭādi for God Kuṟṟam-poruttaruḷiya-nāyanār. It is stated that the ūramai of the whole of Kaḷani-vāśal was ten, out of which 2-(1/2) was the tirunāmattukkāṇi-iṟai-ili (tax free land to be held in its own charge by the temple ?) (Ūramai obviously referred to the apportionment of the village into ten blocs)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam poṟu
ttaruḷiya nāyaṉārkku Amutupaṭi cāttu
ppaṭikkum puraṭṭātit tirunāḷukkum Uṭa
lāka vemparnāṭṭil kiḻ kūṟṟil kaḻa
ṉivāy Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tevatāṉam mutala
ṭaṅkalum Iṟaiyili Āka perumā
ḷ parākrama pāṇṭiya tevarkku Iraṇ
ṭāvatu mutal tantaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiye
nāṅkaḷum Ivvūr mutalaṭaṅkalum I
ṟaiyili Āka Ivvūrāl varum vāram ka
ṭamai kāṇikkai nāṭṭu viṉiyoka
m vaṉṉiya vari Uḷ[ ppaṭṭa] Aṉaittu viṉi
yokaṅkaḷum cantirātittavaraiyum cella
Iṟaiyili Ākattantom Ippaṭikku
kallilum cempilum veṭṭikko
ḷḷavum patu Ivai ceturāyar E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nāṭṭavar paṇi
yāl nāṭṭukkaṇakku māśviyāntit
tār Eḻuttu § veṇpar nāṭṭār vamcam
vattikka[�] Iṉṉāyiṉār tevatāṉam kaḻaṉi
vācal Ūraṭaṅkalum Ūramai pat
tu Itil Iraṇṭaraiyum tirunāmattuk
kāṇiyiṟaiyili śivamastu §
Digital edition of SII 28.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
